const skills = [ { icon: '🌐', name: 'HTML' }, { icon: '🎨', name: 'CSS' }, { icon: '⚡', name: 'JavaScript' }, { icon: '⚛️', name: 'React' }, { icon: '🐙', name: 'Git' }, { icon: '📦', name: 'Node.js' }, { icon: '🗄️', name: 'REST APIs' }, { icon: '📱', name: 'Responsive' }, ] export default function Skills() { return (

Skills

{skills.map(skill => (
{skill.icon}
{skill.name}
))}
) }
